message:
feat(python): numpy.lexsort wrapper parity (franken_numpy-4zgh)

Adds a passthrough wrapper for numpy.lexsort(keys, axis=-1) so
indirect stable sort by a sequence of keys (last key = primary sort)
matches numpy. Test covers tuple of two 1-D keys, 2-D keys array,
tie-breaking by secondary key with permutation correctness verified,
single-key length-1 tuple, axis=0 on 2-D keys, and string keys.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
